final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 anniversary celebration e-commerce announcement.

Style/medium: commercial e-commerce poster, modern tech aesthetic with premium consumer electronics visual language
Composition: centered hero layout with product focal point, balanced negative space for text overlay, 3:4 portrait orientation
Subject: UGREEN NAS (network attached storage) device as hero product, sleek minimalist design with subtle branding
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient background suggesting data flow and cloud connectivity, subtle tech patterns
Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting with soft rim light, professional product photography atmosphere
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as primary accent, neutral dark grays and whites as base, vibrant celebration red/orange for 618 promotional elements
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云品牌618周年庆活动电商宣布海报"
Constraints: must accommodate Chinese text overlay clearly; maintain brand consistency with UGREEN visual identity; suitable for e-commerce platform display
Avoid: cluttered composition, generic stock photo aesthetic, illegible text placement, overly busy backgrounds, 8K stuffer language
